sections.paragraph:
γόγγυσος, ον (s. γογγύζω and γογγυσμός; Pr 16:28 Theod.; Herodian Gr. 1, 213, 19) complaining: subst. grumbler D 3:6.

Theod. Theod. = Theodotion, revision of Greek OT, II a.d.—List 2, beg.

Herodian Herodian = Herodianus Historicus, III a.d.—List 5

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 204
